title: Heidi Gordon
content:
Partner | Co-Head of M&A
People.ContactEmail hgordon@mccarthy.ca
With a clear sense for what can make or break a deal, Heidi’s practical approach to solving challenges is what clients value most.
Heidi Gordon is a partner in our Business Law Group in Toronto and Co-Head of the Firm’s national M&A Group. Heidi is a public and private M&A lawyer, who leads her clients through their most important corporate transactions, spanning a wide range of sectors. Her clients include Canadian and international businesses, boards of directors, family offices, and private equity firms and their portfolio companies. A significant portion of her work involves advising on transactions across borders, including helping international investors navigate the Canadian dealmaking landscape in the context of making investments in, and acquiring, Canadian businesses.
Heidi is consistently recognized as a leading lawyer in M&A. She is Chambers and Lexpert ranked, and in 2022 was named a Lexpert Rising Star – Canada’s Leading Lawyers Under 40. She speaks and writes on M&A, corporate governance and related topics, and has lectured at Western University Faculty of Law, University of Windsor Faculty of Law and The Directors College (a university accredited corporate director development program). She is a past member of the Toronto Steering Committee of VersaFi (formerly, Women in Capital Markets).
Heidi completed secondments at Constellation Software, and the Office of Mergers & Acquisitions at the Ontario Securities Commission. While at Constellation, she led the acquisition of a number of privately-held software companies. In her role at the Ontario Securities Commission, she participated in the oversight of public M&A transactions and other matters involving public companies, and worked on policy projects in the areas of M&A and shareholder rights, including the most recent overhaul to Canada’s take-over bid regime.
For more information on her recent publicly announced transactions, see below under Experience.
